violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (Ice Machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of. Ice machine to be professionally cleaned. Establishment to send photos of cleaned and sanitized ice machine to RIDOH before resuming use. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025
The lid on the ice machine in in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, and Ice Machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025

The doors to the outside, located in throughout the establishment, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

The dishwashers located in the kitchen and bar area was not in good repair. The two door reach in located in the kitchen was not in good repair. the ice machine located in the kitchen was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
The Bar is lacking a three bay sink. A three bay sink must be installed at the bar. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

The ice machine is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

The floor behind the bar is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. The drain behind the bar is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. The ceiling tiles in the establishment were observed with water damage. The facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025
